metadata.description: Claude Code skills for CI/CD, Rust, documentation, code analysis, and design.

plugins.name: ci-moonrepo
plugins.description: moonrepo v2.2 expert -- workspace setup, task orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, Docker integration, remote caching, code generation, WASM plugin toolchains, MQL queries, v1-to-v2 migration, and a curated catalogue of real-world gotchas from production monorepos.

plugins.name: rust-utoipa
plugins.description: Rust OpenAPI documentation with utoipa v5.4. Complete macro reference, path attributes, security schemes, enum handling, validation, and integrations for Axum, Actix-web, Rocket.

plugins.name: docs-eventcatalog
plugins.description: Document event-driven architectures with EventCatalog. Covers all 13 resource types (including Data Products), the full SDK (snapshots, DSL builders, custom docs), 15+ generator integrations, MCP server, visualizations, and schema support.

plugins.name: rust-fmodel
plugins.description: Functional domain modeling in Rust with fmodel-rust v0.9 (MSRV 1.75+, native async-fn-in-trait). Decider, View, Saga domain types, algebraic composition via combine/merge/map, and application-layer wiring (aggregates, MaterializedView, SagaManager).

plugins.name: analysis-codebase-archaeology
plugins.description: Deep structural analysis of any codebase -- extracts business rules, maps data flows, traces dependencies, assesses risk, and produces transformation plans. Supports 7 analysis lenses.

plugins.name: design-principles
plugins.description: Curated reference library of canonical design principles (Dieter Rams, Joshua Porter, Bruce Tognazzini, inclusive design, Postel's law, principle of least surprise) for UI, product, and crosscutting design judgment.
